title: pouteria cayennensis
intro: Pouteria cayennensis, also known as Cayenne chestnut, is a tropical plant species in the family Sapotaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its seeds, bark, and leaves, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Pouteria cayennensis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. Pouteria cayennensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are also used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues and as a general tonic.
